The armies of the First Crusade arrive a: Sojojin boren First Crusade sun isa Constantinople; Alexios ya sami rantsuwar aminci daga shugabanninsu.
Byzantine forces, in cooperation with th: Dakarun Byzantine, tare da hadin gwiwar Crusaders, sun sake kwace Nicaea, Smyrna, Ephesus, da sauran yankuna masu mahimmanci na Anatolia.
Dies in Constantinople, leaving a stabil: Ya mutu a Constantinople, inda ya bar daula mai karko da ke farfadowa ga dansa, John II Komnenos.
He halted the Byzantine Empire's decline: Ya tsayar da faduwar Daular Byzantine, ya gyara soja da na gudanarwa, sannan ya dawo da yankunan da aka rasa, wanda hakan ya kaddamar da karni na wadata.
His appeal for Western military aid agai: Neman taimakon soja na Yammacin duniya yaki da Seljuks ya haifar da kaddamar da First Crusade ba tare da shiri ba, wanda ya sake fasalin alakar Gabas da Yamma sosai.
His decisive victory at the Battle of Le: Gagarumar nasararsa a Yakin Levounion (1091) ta kawar da barazanar Pecheneg gaba daya daga Balkans.
Did Alexios want the First Crusade?: Shin Alexios yana son First Crusade?
Not in the form it took. He requested a: Ba a siffar da ta dauka ba. Ya nemi kananan dakarun soji na musamman na Yammacin duniya don su yi aiki karkashin umarninsa. Ya cika da mamaki da kuma fargaba lokacin da manyan sojoji masu zaman kansu na 'crusaders' suka isa da manufofinsu.
It was complex and often tense. He saw t: Ta kasance mai sarkakiya da kuma yawan tashin hangali. Ya kalle su a matsayin makami mai karfi amma mai hadari. Ya yi amfani da diflomasiyya da barazanar a boye don ya sa su rantse cewa za su dawo masa da tsoffin kasashen Byzantine, amma rikice-rikice a kan yankuna da shugabanci sun kasance akai-akai.
He reformed the currency to combat infla: Ya gyara kudin kasar don yaki da hauhawar farashi, ya sake tsara sojoji karkashin sabon tsarin ba da filaye (pronoia), sannan ya tsara gwamnati a tsakiya, inda ya dogara sosai ga danginsa don tabbatar da aminci da iko.
Born in Herat, then a major city in the: An haife shi a Herat, wanda a lokacin yake zama babban birni a Daular Timurid (Afghanistan ta yanzu).
Forced to flee Herat with his family aft: An tilasta masa gudu daga Herat tare da iyalinsa bayan mutuwar sarkin Timurid Shahrukh.
Returns to Herat after his childhood fri: Ya koma Herat bayan abokinsa na kuruciya, Husayn Bayqara, ya zama sarki. An nada shi a matsayin babban jami'i da mai ba da shawara.
Appointed as vizier (chief minister), ga: An nada shi a matsayin vizier (babban minista), wanda ya ba shi babban ikon siyasa da tasiri.
Composes his magnum opus, the 'Khamsa' (: Ya rubuta babban littafinsa, 'Khamsa' (Quintet), tarin wakoki na tarihi guda biyar a cikin harshen Chagatai.
Completes 'Muhakamat al-Lughatayn' (The: Ya kammala 'Muhakamat al-Lughatayn' (The Comparison of the Two Languages), wata makala da ke kare fifikon adabi na Turkic a kan Farsi.
Dies in Herat, leaving behind a vast leg: Ya mutu a Herat, inda ya bar babban gado na adabi da tallafawa gine-gine.
He elevated the Chagatai Turkic language: Ya daukaka harshen Chagatai Turkic don ya kasance da matsayin adabi mai girma, inda ya kalubalanci ikon Farsi.
He wrote a collection of five epic poems: Ya rubuta tarin wakoki na tarihi guda biyar wadanda suka zama ginshikin adabin Turkic, suna yin gaba da shahararrun wakokin Farsi.
As a vizier, he was a major patron of ar: A matsayinya na vizier, ya kasance babban mai tallafa wa fasaha, gine-gine, da kuma kimiyya, inda ya dauki nauyin gina masallatai, madrasas, dakunan karatu, da kuma asibitoci sama da 370.
His work 'The Comparison of the Two Lang: Aikinsa 'The Comparison of the Two Languages' ya kasance aikin farko na ilimin kwatanta harsuna da kuma kariya mai karfi ga harshensa na gida.
Navoi' is a pen name, which means 'the m: 'Navoi' sunan bogi ne, wanda ke nufin 'mai dadi' ko 'mai kyawawan murya' a harshen Farsi. Sunansa na gaske shi ne Nizam-al-Din Ali-Shir.
No, quite the opposite. Navoi was deeply: A'a, akasin haka ma. Navoi yana da babban ilimi a adabin Farsi kuma ya girmama mawaƙan kamar Nizami Ganjavi da Jami sosai. Burinsa ba don rage darajar Farsi ba ne, amma don tabbatar da cewa Turkic daidai yake da shi a fannin adabi.
Why is he so important in Central Asia t: Me yasa yake da matukar mahimmanci a Tsakiyar Asiya yau?
Alisher Navoi is considered a national h: Ana kallon Alisher Navoi a matsayin gwarzon kasa da kuma uban adabi a kasashe da dama da ke jin harshen Turkic, musamman Uzbekistan. An sanya wa birane, jami'o'i, har ma da daukacin lardi a Uzbekistan sunansa, kuma aikinsa yana zama muhimmiyar kashi ta asalin kasa.
Born in Bukhara, Transoxiana (present-da: An haife shi a Bukhara, Transoxiana (Uzbekistan ta yanzu).
Reportedly lost his sight in early child: An ce ya rasa ganinsa lokacin da yake yaro amma cikin mu'ujiza ya sake samun sa.
At age 16, he traveled to Mecca for the: Yana da shekaru 16, ya tafi Mecca don aikin Hajj sannan ya fara tafiye-tafiye na tara hadisai.
Spent over 16 years traveling throughout: Ya shafe fiye da shekaru 16 yana tafiya a daukacin Abbasid Caliphate, ciki har da manyan cibiyoyin ilimi a Iraq, Syria, Egypt, da kuma Hejaz.
Completed his magnum opus, 'Sahih al-Buk: Ya kammala babban littafinsa, 'Sahih al-Bukhari', bayan ya tantance hadisai sama da 600,000 daki-daki.
Faced a theological dispute in Nishapur,: Ya fuskanci sabanin addini a Nishapur, wanda ya haifar da gudun hijirarsa.
Died in Khartank, a village near Samarka: Ya mutu a Khartank, wani kauye kusa da Samarkand, bayan an kore shi daga garinsu na Bukhara.
Authored the hadith collection regarded: Ya rubuta tarin hadisai wadanda musulmai Sunni ke kallo a matsayin littafi mafi inganci bayan Alkur'ani.
Developed and implemented a rigorous met: Ya samar kuma ya aiwatar da tsari mai tsanani ('ilm al-rijal) don tabbatar da ingancin hadisai ta hanyar bincikar tarihin rayuwa da amincin masu ruwaito hadisan.
Authored numerous other works on hadith: Ya rubuta wasu manyan ayyuka a kan hadisi da kuma shari'ar Musulunci, kamar 'Al-Adab al-Mufrad'.
A hadith is a report of the sayings, act: Hadisi shi ne labari na zantuka, ayyuka, ko amincewa ta shiru na Annabin Musulunci Muhammad. Su ne babban tushen dokar Musulunci da jagorancin dabi'u, na biyu bayan Alkur'ani.
Why is 'Sahih al-Bukhari' so important?: Me yasa 'Sahih al-Bukhari' yake da matukar mahimmanci?
It is considered the most reliable colle: Ana kallon sa a matsayin tarin hadisai mafi inganci saboda tsauraran dokokin Imam al-Bukhari na shigar da hadisi. Ya bukaci cikakken sarkar masu ruwaito hadisi wadanda za a iya amincewa da su kuma sun hadu da juna, wanda hakan ya wuce sauran masu tara hadisai.
He was exiled due to a theological dispu: An kore shi ne sakamakon sabanin addini da kuma kishin sana'a. Wani malamin kishiyarsa a Nishapur ya kalubalanci matsayinsa a kan ko karanta Alkur'ani halitta ce, wani batu mai matukar hadari. Wannan ya sa sarkin Bukhara ya bukaci a koya masa ilimi na musamman, wanda al-Bukhari ya ki amincewa, wanda hakan ya kai ga gudun hijirarsa na karshe.
Born in the Fergana Valley, Transoxiana: An haife shi a kwarin Fergana, Transoxiana (Uzbekistan ta yanzu).
Moved to Baghdad and began working at th: Ya koma Baghdad sannan ya fara aiki a House of Wisdom karkashin goyon bayan Caliph al-Ma'mun.
Wrote his most famous work, 'Elements of: Ya rubuta aikinsa mafi shahara, 'Elements of Astronomy' (Jawāmiʿ ʿIlm al-Nujūm).
Participated in the project to measure t: Ya shiga cikin aikin auna diamita na duniya a hamadar Siriya.
Traveled to Egypt to design and supervis: Ya tafi kasar Egypt don tsarawa da kula da ginin Great Nilometer a tsibirin Rawda, Fustat (Alkahira ta da).
His exact death year is unknown, but his: Ainihin shekarar mutuwarsa ba ta da tabbas, amma aiki na karshe da aka rubuta game da shi shi ne a shekarar 861.
A concise, non-mathematical summary of P: Takaitaccen bayani, wanda ba na lissafi ba, na Almagest ta Ptolemy wanda ya zama littafin karatu a Turai na tsawon shekaru sama da 400 karkashin sunan 'Alfraganus'.
Participated in a project commissioned b: Ya shiga cikin aikin da Caliph al-Ma'mun ya kaddamar don auna latitude, wanda ya samar da lambar daidai ta zagayen duniya.
Designed and supervised the construction: Ya kera kuma ya kula da ginin wani babban tsari a Alkahira don auna yawan ruwan kogin Nile na kowace shekara, wanda aka ci gaba da amfani da shi na tsawon daruruwan shekaru.
He was widely known in the Latin West as: An san shi sosai a Yammacin Latin da sunan 'Alfraganus'.
Was Al-Farghani only an astronomer?: Shin Al-Farghani masanin sararin samaniya ne kawai?
No, he was also a skilled engineer, most: A'a, ya kasance kwararren injiniya, wanda ya nuna gwanintarsa ta hanyar kera da kuma ginin Nilometer a Alkahira.
It was a primary university textbook in: Ya kasance babban littafin karatu a jami'o'in Turai har zuwa karni na 15 kuma ya yi tasiri a kan manyan mutane kamar Dante, Sacrobosco, da kuma Regiomontanus.
The House of Wisdom (Bayt al-Hikma) was: House of Wisdom (Bayt al-Hikma) ta kasance babban cibiyar ilimi lokacin Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci, wadda ke Baghdad.
An haife shi a matsayin dan Grand Prince Vladimir.
Bayan mutuwar Grand Prince Vladimir, yakin neman sarauta tsakanin 'yan uwa ya barke.
Ya kayar da yayansa Sviatopolk a Yakin kogin Alta sannan ya zama Grand Prince na Kyiv.
Ya samar da tsari na farko na dokar Rus' 'Russkaya Pravda'.
키예프 공성전에서 페체네그족을 결정적으로 격파하고 루스의 유일한 통치자가: Ya kayar da Pechenegs gaba daya a Yakin Kyiv sannan ya zama sarki daya tilo na Rus'.
Ya fara ginin Saint Sophia Cathedral a Kyiv don tunawa da nasararsa.
Ya mutu a Vyshhorod bayan ya raba yankunansa ga 'ya'yansa maza guda biyar.
최초의 동슬라브 법률 체계를 성문화하여 정의와 질서의 기틀을 마련했습니다: Ta samar da tsarin doka na farko na East Slavic, wanda ya kafa ginshikin adalci da oda.
그의 통치는 교육, 건축, 문해력을 증진시키며 키예프 루스의 문화적, 정: Mulkinsa ya inganta ilimi, gine-gine, da rubutu da karatu, wanda ya zama kololuwar al'adu da siyasa ta Kievan Rus'.
1036년 유목민 페체네그족에게 최종적이고 압도적인 패배를 안겨 루스의: Ya kayar da makiyaya Pechenegs gaba daya a shekarar 1036, wanda ya kare kan iyakar kudu ta Rus'.
딸들과 자매들을 프랑스, 노르웨이, 헝가리, 폴란드의 왕가와 전략적으로: Ya aurar da 'ya'yansa mata da kanwansa ga gidajen sarauta na Faransa, Norway, Hungary, da Poland ta hanyar dabarar siyasa.
왜 '현명공'이라고 불리나요?: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'the Wise'?
학교와 도서관을 설립하는 등 문화와 학문을 후원하고, 루스 최초의 성문법: Saboda ya tallafa wa al'adu da ilimi ta hanyar kafa makarantu da dakunan karatu, sannan ya samar da dokar farko ta Rus' 'Russkaya Pravda'.
키예프 루스의 첫 번째 법전입니다. 개인적인 복수를 벌금 제도로 대체하고: Ita ce doka ta farko ta Kievan Rus'. Ta musanya daukar fansa ta kashin kansa da tsarin tara, sannan ta kafa ka'idojin shari'a game da dukiya, laifi, da matsayin al'umma.
그의 사후 키예프 루스는 어떻게 되었나요?: Me ya faru da Kievan Rus' bayan mutuwarsa?
아들들에게 평화롭게 지내라는 그의 경고에도 불구하고, 그의 죽음은 후손들: Duk da gargadin da ya yi wa 'ya'yansa na su zauna cikin zaman lafiya, mutuwarsa ta haifar da rabuwar kai da fadace-fadace a tsakanin magadansa, wanda a karshe ya raunana kasar.
Born, likely in a village on the Norther: An haife shi, wataƙila a wani kauye a kan kogin Northern Dvina. Rayuwarsa ta farko ba ta da bayanai sosai.
Gained notoriety as a Cossack ataman, po: Ya zama sananne a matsayin ataman na Cossack, wataƙila yana da alaka da fashi da kuma dakarun soji na haya a kan kogunan Volga da Don.
Hired by the Stroganov merchant family,: Dangin Stroganov sun dauke shi aiki, Yermak ya jagoranci dakarun Cossacks sama da 800 ta Tsaunukan Ural don yaki da Khanate of Sibir.
Achieves a decisive victory against Khan: Ya samu gagarumar nasara yaki da sojojin Khan Kuchum a Yakin Chuvash Cape.
Captures Qashliq (Isker), the capital of: Ya kwace Qashliq (Isker), babban birnin Khanate of Sibir, wanda ya tilasta wa Khan Kuchum gudu zuwa steppe.
Yermak sends his lieutenant Ivan Koltso: Yermak ya tura mataimakinsa Ivan Koltso zuwa Moscow da labarin nasarar da kuma kyautar fatun dabbobi. Tsar Ivan the Terrible ya yafe wa Cossacks a hukumance sannan ya tura musu dakarun soji na karfafa gwiwa.
Ambushed by Khan Kuchum's forces while c: Sojojin Khan Kuchum sun kai masa hari na kwanto lokacin da yake kafa sansani a wani tsibiri a kan kogin Irtysh. Yermak ya nutse a ruwa, wanda ake zargin nauyin sulken da Tsar ya ba shi a matsayin kyauta ya ja shi.
Conquest of the Khanate of Sibir: Cin Khanate of Sibir da Yaki
His campaign led to the collapse of the: Yakin da ya yi ya haifar da rushewar Tatar Khanate, wanda ya bude babbar kasa don mamayar Rasha.
Initiation of Russian Expansion into Sib: Farkon Fadada Kasar Rasha zuwa Siberia
Yermak's expedition was the pivotal firs: Tafiyar Yermak ta kasance babban mataki na farko na fadada kasar Rasha zuwa gabas, wanda a karshe ya kai ga Tekun Pacific.
Despite his ambiguous origins, he became: Duk da asalin sa da ba a sani ba sosai, ya zama shahararren mutum a tarihin Rasha da tatsuniyoyi, inda ake girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa da ya fadada kasar Rasha.
Was Yermak a pirate?: Shin Yermak dan fashin kogi ne?
His early life is poorly documented, but: Rayuwarsa ta farko ba ta da bayanai sosai, amma tushen tarihi da tatsuniyoyi da dama sun nuna cewa shi dan fashin kogi ne a kan Volga kafin dangin Stroganov su dauke shi aiki. Yafewar da Tsar ya yi masa a hukumance na laifukan da ya yi a baya tana goyon bayan wannan ra'ayi.
Why did Yermak invade Siberia?: Me yasa Yermak ya mamaye Siberia?
He was initially hired by the Stroganov: A farko, dangin Stroganov ne suka dauke shi aiki don kare sansanonsu daga hare-hare na Siberian Tatars karkashin jagorancin Khan Kuchum. Wannan aiki na tsaro da sauri ya sauya ya zama yakin cin kasa da yaki.
How did Yermak's small force defeat the: Yaya kananan sojojin Yermak suka kayar da manyan sojojin Tatar?
Yermak's Cossacks had a significant tech: Cossacks na Yermak suna da babban amfani na fasaha ta hanyar amfani da bindigogi (muskets). Tatars, wadanda galibi ke amfani da baka, kiban, da mashi, yawanci ba su da ikon tsayawa yaki da harbin bindiga na Cossacks.
He was killed during a surprise night at: An kashe shi ne a lokacin wani hari na kwanto da dakarun Tatar suka kai da daddare a watan Agusta na shekarar 1585. Yayin da yake kokarin guduwa zuwa jirginsa na ruwa, ya nutse a kogin Irtysh, wanda ake kyautata zaton nauyin sulken da Tsar ya ba shi a matsayin kyauta ne ya ja shi.
An haife shi a Antioch a cikin dangi na sarakuna.
Begins an ascetic life as a hermit in th: Ya fara rayuwa ta tsantsani a matsay인 hermit a tsaunukan kusa da Antioch bayan mutuwar mahaifiyarsa.
Ordained a presbyter (priest) in Antioch: An nada shi a matsayin priest a Antioch sannan ya fara aikinsa na musamman na yin wa'azi.
Consecrated Archbishop of Constantinople: An nada shi a matsayin Archbishop na Constantinople ba tare da son ransa ba, wanda ya sanya shi zama babban mutum a babban birnin sarki.
Condemned and briefly exiled by the Syno: Synod of the Oak ta la'ane shi sannan an tura shi gudun hijira na wani dan lokaci, wanda abokan hamayyarsa na siyasa da na coci suka tsara.
Exiled a second time by Empress Eudoxia,: Sarauniya Eudoxia ta sake tura shi gudun hijira a karo na biyu, a wannan karon zuwa Cucusus da ke Armenia.
Dies during a forced march to a more rem: Ya mutu lokacin wata tafiya ta dole zuwa wani wurin gudun hijira mai nisa a Pityus da ke kan Tekun Black.
His eloquent sermons (homilies) on the B: Zafafan wa'azinsa a kan Littafi Mai Tsarki da kuma dabi'u na Kirista ya ba shi lakabin 'Chrysostom' bayan mutuwarsa.
Recognized in both Eastern and Western C: An amince da shi a cikin Kiristanci na Gabas da na Yamma saboda babban gudunmawarsa ga ilimin addini da koyarwa.
He was a fierce critic of wealth and lux: Ya kasance mai sukar dukiya da jin dadi na karya, inda ya mayar da kudaden coci don gina asibitoci da taimaka wa talakawa.
The Divine Liturgy of St. John Chrysosto: The Divine Liturgy of St. John Chrysostom har yanzu ita ce babbar ibada da Cocin Eastern Orthodox da kuma Byzantine Rite Catholic Churches ke amfani da ita.
The name 'Chrysostomos' is Greek for 'go: Sunan 'Chrysostomos' harshen Helenanci ne wanda ke nufin 'mai muryar zinariya.' Wani lakabi ne da aka ba shi bayan mutuwarsa don girmama gwanintarsa ta musamman da kuma karfinsa a matsayin mai wa'azi.
What was his conflict with Empress Eudox: Menene rikicinsa da Sarauniya Eudoxia yake kai?
He publicly denounced the extravagance a: Ya yi tir da almubazzaranci da gurbacewar dabi'u na fadar sarki a fili. Sarauniya Eudoxia ta ji cewa wa'azinsa na kai tsaye ne gare ta, wanda hakan ya haifar da gaba mai tsanani da kuma gudun hijirarsa na karshe.
Among his many writings, his 'Divine Lit: A cikin rubuce-rubucensa da yawa, 'Divine Liturgy of St. John Chrysostom' dinsa har yanzu ita ce babbar ibada ta eucharistic ta Cocin Eastern Orthodox. Har ila yanzu ana yin nazari sosai a kan wa'azinsa da yawa a kan littattafan Littafi Mai Tsarki.
Why did he become a hermit?: Me yasa ya zama sufi mai zaman kansa (hermit)?
Influenced by the early Christian monast: Bisa tasirin yunkurin sufanci na farko na Kirista, ya nemi rayuwa ta horon ruhaniya, addu'a, da kuma tunani, wadda aka cire ta daga shagala da sha'awoyi na rayuwar birni.
Born Mīrzā Muhammad Tāraghay bin Shāhruk: An haife shi a matsayin Mirza Muhammad Taraghay bin Shahrukh a Soltaniyeh, Persia.
Appointed as the governor of Samarkand a: Mahaifinsa Shah Rukh ya nada shi a matsayin gwamnan Samarkand yana da shekaru 16.
Begins construction of the Ulugh Beg Mad: Ya fara ginin Ulugh Beg Madrasa (makarantar Musulunci) a dandalin Registan da ke Samarkand.
Builds the great Ulugh Beg Observatory i: Ya gina babban Ulugh Beg Observatory a Samarkand don inganta nazarin sararin samaniya.
Completes the 'Zij-i Sultani' (Sultanic: Ya kammala 'Zij-i Sultani' (Sultanic Star Tables), wani babban tarin taswirar taurari da kuma makalar sararin samaniya.
Ascends to the throne of the Timurid Emp: Ya hau karagar mulki ta Daular Timurid bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa Shah Rukh, wanda ya haifar da lokaci na rashin karko.
Defeated in battle by his rebellious son: Dansa mai tawaye Abd al-Latif Mirza ya kayar da shi a yaki, sannan aka kashe shi kusa da Samarkand.
Constructed one of the finest observator: Ya gina daya daqun manyan observatories a duniyar Musulunci, wanda ke dauke da katon Fakhri sextant mai radius na kimanin mita 36.
A highly accurate star catalogue of 1,01: Tarin taswirar taurari guda 1,018 mai inganci sosai, wanda ake kallo a matsayin mafi inganci a zamaninsa da kuma na kusan shekaru 200 bayan haka.
Made significant contributions to trigon: Ya ba da babban gudunmawa ga trigonometry da spherical geometry, inda ya auna sine da tangent tables har zuwa decimal guda takwas.
Was Ulugh Beg a good ruler?: Shin Ulugh Beg sarki ne mai kyau?
His rule as the Timurid Sultan was short: Mulkinsa a matsayin Sultan na Timurid ya kasance gajere kuma cike da rikici. Kodayake shi babban mai tallafa wa fasaha da kimiyya ne, bai kasance kwararren kwamandan soja ko dan siyasa ba, wanda hakan ya kai ga faduwarsa cikin sauri da kuma kisa.
What was so special about his observator: Menene na musamman game da observatory dinsa?
It was a true research institute, not ju: Ya kasance babban cibiyar bincike na gaske, ba wai kawai wurin tsaro ba. Babban makaminsa, watau katon masonry sextant, ya ba da damar auna matsayin taurari cikin inganci da ba a taba gani ba.
How did his work influence later science: Yaya aikinsa ya yi tasiri a kan kimiyya ta gaba?
His star catalogue was translated and ci: An fassara tarin taswirar taurarinsa kuma an yada shi, wanda ya kai Turai a karni na 17. Ya samar da muhimman bayanai ga masana sararin samaniya kamar Tycho Brahe sannan an kalle shi a matsayin tarin taswirar taurari mafi mahimmanci tsakanin Ptolemy da Brahe.
Birth of Flavius Petrus Sabbatius in Tau: An haife shi a Flavius Petrus Sabbatius a Tauresium.
Ascends to the throne as Emperor Justini: Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Sarki Justinian I.
The Nika riots erupt in Constantinople a: Bore na Nika ya barke a Constantinople sannan an murkushe shi da karfi.
The Corpus Juris Civilis (Body of Civil: An tattara kuma an buga Corpus Juris Civilis (Body of Civil Law).
General Belisarius reconquers North Afri: Kwamanda Belisarius ya sake kwace Arewacin Afirka daga hannun Vandals.
The rebuilt Hagia Sophia is consecrated: An kebe Hagia Sophia da aka sake gina ta a Constantinople.
The Plague of Justinian begins, a pandem: Cutar yaduwa ta Justinian (Plague of Justinian) ta fara, wata cutar yaduwa da ta lalata mutanen daular.
The Gothic War concludes, with Byzantium: Yakin Gothic ya zo karshe, inda Byzantium ke da ikon Italiya bayan dogon yaki na lalacewa.
The monumental codification of all Roman: Babban tsarin tattara duk wata doka ta Roma, wanda ya zama ginshikin tsarin dokar gida (civil law) na yanzu a daukacin duniya.
The ambitious program of 'restoration of: Gagarumin shirin na 'maido da Daula', wanda ya kai ga sake kwace sassa na Daular Roma ta Yamma.
Commissioned hundreds of churches and se: Ya ba da umarnin gina coci-coci da gine-gine na gida daruruwan a daukacin daular, musamman Hagia Sophia a Constantinople.
Was Justinian truly a 'Roman' emperor?: Shin da gaske ne Justinian sarki ne na 'Roma'?
Yes. He was the ruler of the Eastern Rom: E. Shi ne sarkin Daular Roma ta Gabas (Byzantium), wadda take zama ci gaba na kai tsaye na Daular Roma. Harshensa na gida shi ne Latin, kuma ya kalli kansa a matsayin magaji na gaskiya na Caesars, wanda ya sadaukar da kansa don maido da yankunan daular da aka rasa.
A massive urban uprising in 532 AD, spar: Wani babban boren birni ne a shekarar 532 AD, wanda kungiyoyin tseren dawakai (Blues da Greens) suka kaddamar da shi, wanda ya sauya ya zama bore yaki da manyan haraji da manufofin Justinian. Ya kusan tilasta masa gudu amma an murkushe shi da karfi, wanda ya haifar da mutuwar mutane dubu da dama.
Immensely. Rising from a humble backgrou: Sosai da sosai. Ta fito daga dangi talaka, ta zama mai ba shi shawara mai aminci da kuma abokiyar mulki. Kin guduwa da ta yi lokacin bore na Nika shi ne ya kare mulkinsa, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai a kan manufofin addini da na al'umma, musamman wadanda suka shafi mata.
Born in Moscow to Grand Prince Vasily II: An haife shi a Moscow ga Grand Prince Vasily II.
Ascends to the throne as Grand Prince of: Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Grand Prince na Moscow.
Defeats the army of the Novgorod Republi: Ya kayar da sojojin Novgorod Republic a Yakin kogin Shelon.
Formally annexes the Republic of Novgoro: Ya hada Novgorod Republic a hukumance, wanda ya kawo karshen 'yancinta.
The Great Stand on the Ugra River, which: The Great Stand a kan kogin Ugra, wanda ke nuna karshen mulkin Mongol-Tatar a kan Rasha.
Annexes the Principality of Tver, his la: Ya mallaki Lardin Tver, abokin hamayyarsa na karshe mai girma na Rasha.
Issues the Sudebnik, a new code of laws: Ya kaddamar da Sudebnik, sabuwar dokar kasa ga kasa dunkulalliya.
Dies in Moscow, leaving a vastly expande: Ya mutu a Moscow, inda ya bar kasa mai babban fadada da kuma tsari a tsakiya ga dansa, Vasily III.
He more than tripled the territory of Mo: Ya ninka yankin Moscow fiye da sau uku ta hanyar mallakar larduna masu hamayya kamar Novgorod da Tver.
He successfully repudiated the authority: Ya yi nasarar kawar da ikon Golden Horde bayan The Great Stand a kan kogin Ugra a shekarar 1480.
He created the Sudebnik of 1497, a new l: Ya kafa Sudebnik na shekarar 1497, sabuwar doka wadda ta daidaita shari'a sannan ta karfafa ikon Grand Prince.
He oversaw the major reconstruction of t: Ya kula da sake gina Moscow Kremlin, inda ya gayyaci masu kera gine-gine na Italiya don gina sabbin coci-coci da fadoji.
He is called 'the Great' for his pivotal: Ana kiran sa 'Mai Girma' saboda muhimmiyar rawarsa wajen kawo karshen mulkin Mongol na tsawon shekaru sama da 200 da kuma hada lardunan Rasha daban-daban ya zama kasa guda mai karfi, wanda ya kafa ginshikin kasar Rasha ta zamani.
What was the Great Stand on the Ugra Riv: Menene The Great Stand a kan kogin Ugra?
It was a military standoff in 1480 betwe: Ya kasance tsayawar soja a shekarar 1480 tsakanin dakarun Ivan III da Golden Horde. Kin janyewa ko biyan kyaututtuka na Ivan, wanda ya kai ga janyewar Horde, ya nuna 'yancin Muscovy gaba daya.
How did his marriage to Sophia Palaiolog: Yaya auren sa da Sophia Palaiologina ya shafi Rasha?
His marriage to the niece of the last By: Auren sa da yar uwar sarkin Byzantine na karshe, Sophia Palaiologina, ya kawo al'adun fadar Byzantine, lakabin 'Tsar' (Caesar), da kuma tambarin gaggafa mai kai biyu zuwa Moscow, wanda ya karfafa ikirarin Moscow a matsayin magajin ruhaniya da na siyasa na Daular Byzantine ('Roma ta Uku').
It was a code of laws Ivan III introduce: Doka ce wadda Ivan III ya gabatar don samar da tsarin shari'a iri daya a daukacin kasashensa da aka hada. Ta daidaita tsarin shari'a sannan ta karfafa ikon gwamnati ta tsakiya.
Becomes Grand Prince of Moscow at age th: Ya zama Grand Prince na Moscow yana da shekaru uku.
Crowned as the first 'Tsar of All Russia: An nada shi sarki a matsayin 'Tsar of All Russia' na farko.
Ya ci Khanate of Kazan da yaki.
Ya ci Khanate of Astrakhan da yaki.
His wife, Anastasia Romanovna, dies, mar: Matarsa Anastasia Romanovna ta mutu, wanda ya nuna sauyi a cikin halayensa.
Establishes the Oprichnina, a period of: Ya kafa Oprichnina, lokacin zalunci na daukacin mutane.
Ya jagoranci kisan kiyashi na Novgorod.
Kills his eldest son and heir, Ivan Ivan: Ya kashe dansa na farko kuma magaji Ivan Ivanovich a cikin fushi.
Dies, leaving the throne to his younger,: Ya mutu, inda ya bar karagar mulki ga dansa mai karanci shekaru kuma maras dacewa Feodor.
First Tsar of All Russia: Tsar of All Russia na Farko
He was the first Muscovite ruler to offi: Shi ne sarki na farko na Muscovite da ya karbi lakabin Tsar a hukumance, wanda ya daukaka matsayin Rasha a duniya.
Conquest of Kazan and Astrakhan: Cin Kazan da Astrakhan da Yaki
His military campaigns successfully anne: Yakokin soja da ya yi sun yi nasarar mallakar Tatar khanates, wanda ya kare daukacin kogin Volga ga Rasha sannan ya bude hanya don fadadawa zuwa gabas.
Through legal reforms (Sudebnik of 1550): Ta hanyar gyaran shari'a (Sudebnik na 1550) da kuma murkushe sarakunan boyar da karfi, ya karfafa ikonsa sannan ya kafa ginshikin mulkin kama-karya na Rasha.
Why was he called 'the Terrible'?: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'the Terrible'?
The Russian epithet, 'Grozny' (Грозный),: Lakabin Rasha 'Grozny' (Грозный) ya fi dacewa a fassara shi da 'mai ban tsoro' ko 'mai ban mamaki.' Yana nuna ikonsa da karfinsa, kodayake ayyukansa na baya na zalunci sun sa fassaran Turanci 'the Terrible' ta kasance.
The Oprichnina was a state policy and te: Oprichnina ta kasance manufar kasa da yanki (1565-1572) inda Ivan IV ya yi mulki kai-tsaye, ta hanyar amfani da masu tsaron lafiyarsa na kashin kansa (the Oprichniki) don kashe wadanda yake kallon su a matsayin maciya amana, musamman sarakunan boyar.
Did he really kill his son?: Shin da gaske ne ya kashe dansa?
Most historical accounts, supported by c: Mafi yawan bayanan tarihi, wadanda ke da goyon baya daga tushen lokacin da kuma hujjojin baya, sun tabbatar da cewa Ivan ya daki dansa Ivan Ivanovich da sanda mai nuni lokacin da suke tattaunawa ta fushi, wanda ya haifar da rauni na mutuwa.
Born in Mazepyntsi, near Bila Tserkva, t: An haife shi a Mazepyntsi, kusa da Bila Tserkva, wanda a lokacin yake zama bangaren Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth.
Elected Hetman of the Zaporizhian Host o: An zabe shi a matsayin Hetman na Zaporizhian Host na Hagu na Ukraine.
Ruled as Hetman, initially as a loyal va: Ya yi mulki a matsayin Hetman, a farko a matsayin mai biyayya ga Tsar Peter the Great na Rasha, sannan ya zama babban mai tallafa wa fasaha da al'adu.
Briefly united both Left-bank and Right-: Ya hada Left-bank da Right-bank na Ukraine na wani lokaci karkashin mulkinsa yayin boren yaki da Poland.
Secretly allied with Charles XII of Swed: Ya kulla kawance a asiri da Charles XII na Sweden yaki da Peter the Great lokacin Great Northern War.
Suffered a decisive defeat alongside the: Ya fuskanci babban kashi tare da Swedes a Yakin Poltava.
Died in exile in Bendery (Tighina), then: Ya mutu a gudun hijira a Bendery (Tighina), wanda a lokacin yake zama bangaren Daular Usmaniyya.
He funded the construction of numerous c: Ya dauki nauyin ginin coci-coci da cibiyoyin ilimi da dama a cikin salon 'Mazepa Baroque', wanda ya inganta farfadowar al'adu.
In 1704, he briefly united most of ethni: A shekarar 1704, ya hada mafi yawan kasashen Ukraine (Left-bank da Right-bank na Ukraine) karkashin mulkinsa a karon farko a cikin shekaru da dama.
His dramatic break with Russia made him: Rabuwar sa da Rasha ta mayar da shi alama mai karfi da dorewa ta yakin neman 'yancin kasa na Ukraine.
Why is Mazepa considered a traitor in Ru: Me yasa ake kallon Mazepa a matsayin maciya amana a Rasha amma gwarzo a Ukraine?
In Russia, he is seen as a traitor for b: A Rasha, ana kallon sa a matsayin maciya amana saboda karya rantsuwar aminci ga Tsar Peter the Great. A Ukraine, ana girmama shi sosai a matsayin gwarzon kasa wanda ya yi yunkurin jaruntaka don samun 'yanci daga ikon Rasha.
